name: Bug Report

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen when using the block or item.

## Current Behavior
What actually happens (e.g., "The item appears as a flat line in the inventory").

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## System Information
- **Mod Version:** [e.g., 1.0.0]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here
